deploy.startCommand: python -c "import os; url=os.environ.get('DATABASE_URL','NOT_SET'); print('DATABASE_URL host:', url.split('@')[-1].split('/')[0] if '@' in url else url)" && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput && python manage.py migrate_schemas --shared && gunicorn config.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --workers 2 --timeout 120
